text: 12th ka result dikhate hi Papa ki woh khamoshi mujhe cheer gayi, aur tabse mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai. Mujhe samajh hi nahi aa raha ki aage back paper ka kya hoga ya cutoff kaise niklega, bas rona ruk hi nahi raha aur lag raha hai jaise sab khatam ho gaya. Abhi main koi career planning nahi kar sakta, mera dil itna bhara hua hai ki bas cheekh nikalne wali hai.

Mummy ne jab bina kuch kahe result card table par rakh diya, toh Mukherjee Nagar ka saara sapna ek pal mein toot gaya aur main wahi zameen par dher ho gaya. 'Kuch nahi hoga mera' wali baat dimaag mein bheed lagakar aa rahi hai aur mujhe saans lene mein bhi mushkil ho rahi hai. Abhi mujhse mat pucho ki next attempt ka kya plan hai, main bas rona chahta hoon aur is dukh mein doob jana chahta hoon.

Result dekhne ke baad jab ghar mein ek ajeeb sa sannata chha gaya, toh meri aatma kaanp gayi aur main hostel wapas jaane ki himmat nahi juta pa raha. Sharma ji ke bete ki rank aur meri failure ke beech ka ye jo sadma hai, wo mujhe kuch bhi sochne nahi de raha. Dimaag blank hai, bas ek ajeeb si ghabrahat ho rahi hai aur rona ruk hi nahi raha hai.

Jab Papa ne result dekh kar bas ek thandi aah bhari aur kamre se chale gaye, toh mera dil baith gaya aur main bas wahi khada kaanpne laga. Main dropper banna chahta tha par ab lagta hai main kisi kaam ka nahi hoon, bas ek bojh hoon parivaar par. Abhi mujhse koi solution mat pucho, mera dimaag itna bhara hua hai ki bas rone ke alawa kuch sujh nahi raha.

Result card dikhane ke baad wo silence itni bhari thi ki mujhe laga main wahi pagal ho jaunga aur bas siskiyan liye ja raha hoon. Sarkari babu banne ka Papa ka sapna aur meri failure ne mujhe itna nichod diya hai ki main blank ho gaya hoon. Koi bhi coaching ya marks ki baat abhi mere palle nahi pad rahi, bas ye ghutan khatam ho jaye kaise bhi.
